fields.name: RSVD_7_1
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FUNC_CFG_EN
fields.description: Enable access to the embedded functions configuration registers^(1) from address 02h to 32h. Default value: 0. (0: disable access to embedded functions configuration registers; 1: enable access to embedded functions configuration registers)

fields.name: FTH_7
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 0000. Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1 LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_6
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 0000. Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1 LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_5
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 0000. Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1 LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_4
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 0000. Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1 LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_3
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 0000. Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1 LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_2
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 0000. Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1 LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_1
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 0000. Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1 LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_0
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 0000. Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1 LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: TIMER_PEDO_FIFO_EN
fields.description: Enable pedometer step counter and time stamp. Default: 0 (0: disable step counter and time stamp data; 1: enable step counter and time stamp data.)

fields.name: TIMER_PEDO_FIFO_DRDY
fields.description: FIFO write mode. Default: 0 (0: enable write in FIFO based on XL/Gyro data-ready; 1: enable write in FIFO at every step detected by step counter.)

fields.name: FTH_11
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_10
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_9
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_8
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: RSVD_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_7
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: DEC_FIFO_GYRO
fields.description: Gyro FIFO (first data set) decimation setting. Default: 000

fields.name: DEC_FIFO_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer FIFO (second data set) decimation setting. Default: 000

fields.name: rsvd_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: rsvd_2
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: rsvd_1
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: rsvd_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: ONLY_HIGH_DATA
fields.description: 8-bit data storage in FIFO. Default: 0 (0: disable MSByte only memorization in FIFO for XL and Gyro; 1: enable MSByte only memorization in FIFO for XL and Gyro)

enum_values.0: disable MSByte only memorization in FIFO for XL and Gyro
enum_values.1: enable MSByte only memorization in FIFO for XL and Gyro

fields.name: TIMER_PEDO_DEC_FIFO
fields.description: Third FIFO data set decimation setting. Default: 000 For the configuration setting, refer to Table 29. These bits are used when the bit TIMER_PEDO_FIFO_EN is set to '1' in FIFO_CTRL2 (07h)

enum_values.0b000: Third FIFO data set not in FIFO

fields.name: RSVD_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: ODR_FIFO
fields.description: FIFO ODR selection, setting FIFO_MODE also. Default: 0000 For the configuration setting, refer to Table 32

fields.name: FIFO_MODE

fields.name: FIFO_STATUS1
fields.description: FIFO status 1

fields.name: FTH
fields.description: FIFO watermark status. Default value: 0 (0: FIFO filling is lower than watermark level^(1) ; 1: FIFO filling is equal to or higher than the watermark level)

fields.name: FIFO_OVER_RUN
fields.description: FIFO overrun status. Default value: 0 (0: FIFO is not completely filled; 1: FIFO is completely filled)

fields.name: FIFO_FULL
fields.description: FIFO full status. Default value: 0 (0: FIFO is not full; 1: FIFO will be full at the next ODR)

fields.name: FIFO_EMPTY
fields.description: FIFO empty bit. Default value: 0 (0: FIFO contains data; 1: FIFO is empty)

fields.name: DIFF_FIFO_11
fields.description: Number of unread words (16-bit axes) stored in FIFO^(2)

fields.name: DIFF_FIFO_10
fields.description: Number of unread words (16-bit axes) stored in FIFO^(2)

fields.description: Number of unread words (16-bit axes) stored in FIFO^(2)

fields.name: FIFO_STATUS3
fields.description: FIFO status 3

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FIFO_PATTERN
fields.description: Word of recursive pattern read at the next reading.

fields.name: FIFO_DATA_OUT_L
fields.description: FIFO data out low

fields.name: FIFO_DATA_OUT_H
fields.description: FIFO data out high

fields.name: ODR_XL
fields.description: Output data rate and power mode selection. Default value: 0000

fields.name: FS_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer full-scale selection. Default value: 00

fields.name: BW_XL
fields.description: Anti-aliasing filter bandwidth selection. Default value: 00

fields.name: RSVD_1
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_4_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: LPF2_XL_EN
fields.description: Accelerometer low-pass filter LPF2 selection. Refer to Figure 5 .

fields.name: HPCF_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer slope filter and high-pass filter configuration and cutoff setting. Refer to Table 65 .

fields.description: Accelerometer slope filter / high-pass filter selection. Refer to Figure 5 .

fields.name: LOW_PASS_ON_6D
fields.description: Low-pass filter on 6D function selection. Refer to Figure 5 .

fields.description: Reserved

fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: Xen_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer X-axis output enable. Default value: 1 (0: X-axis output disabled; 1: X-axis output enabled)

fields.name: Yen_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer Y-axis output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Y-axis output disabled; 1: Y-axis output enabled)

fields.name: Zen_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer Z-axis output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Z-axis output disabled; 1: Z-axis output enabled)

Gyroscope Control.name: ORIENT_CFG_G
Gyroscope Control.description: Angular rate sensor sign and orientation register (r/w).

fields.name: SignX_G
fields.description: Pitch axis (X) angular rate sign. Default value: 0 (0: positive sign; 1: negative sign)

fields.name: SignY_G
fields.description: Roll axis (Y) angular rate sign. Default value: 0 (0: positive sign; 1: negative sign)

fields.name: SignZ_G
fields.description: Yaw axis (Z) angular rate sign. Default value: 0 (0: positive sign; 1: negative sign)

fields.name: Orient_2
fields.description: Orient [2:0] Directional user-orientation selection. Default value: 000 For the configuration setting, refer to Table 36.

fields.name: Orient_1
fields.description: Orient [2:0] Directional user-orientation selection. Default value: 000 For the configuration setting, refer to Table 36.

fields.name: Orient_0
fields.description: Orient [2:0] Directional user-orientation selection. Default value: 000 For the configuration setting, refer to Table 36.

fields.name: RSVD_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: ODR_G
fields.description: Gyroscope output data rate selection. Default value: 0000 (Refer to Table 46 )

fields.name: FS_G
fields.description: Gyroscope full-scale selection. Default value: 00 (00: 245 dps; 01: 500 dps; 10: 1000 dps; 11: 2000 dps)

fields.name: FS_125
fields.description: Gyroscope full-scale at 125 dps. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: TRIG_EN
fields.description: Gyroscope data edge-sensitive trigger enable. Default value: 0 (0: external trigger disabled; 1: external trigger enabled)

fields.name: LVLen
fields.description: Gyroscope data level-sensitive trigger enable. Default value: 0 (0: level-sensitive trigger disabled; 1: level sensitive trigger enabled)

fields.name: LVL2_EN
fields.description: Gyroscope level-sensitive latched enable. Default value: 0 (0: level-sensitive latched disabled; 1: level sensitive latched enabled)

fields.name: XL_HM_MODE
fields.description: High-performance operating mode disable for accelerometer. Default value: 0 (0: high-performance operating mode enabled; 1: high-performance operating mode disabled)

fields.name: STEP_COUNT_DELTA
fields.description: Step count delta value

fields.name: RSVD_1_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: G_HM_MODE
fields.description: High-performance operating mode disable for gyroscope^(1) . Default: 0 (0: high-performance operating mode enabled; 1: high-performance operating mode disabled)

fields.name: HP_G_EN
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter enable. Default value: 0 (0: HPF disabled; 1: HPF enabled)

fields.name: HPCF_G1
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter cutoff frequency selection. Default value: 00. Refer to Table 62 .

fields.name: HPCF_G0
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter cutoff frequency selection. Default value: 00. Refer to Table 62 .

fields.name: HP_G_RST
fields.description: Gyro digital HP filter reset. Default: 0 (0: gyro digital HP filter reset OFF; 1: gyro digital HP filter reset ON)

fields.name: ROUNDING_STATUS
fields.description: Source register rounding function enable on STATUS_REG (1Eh) , FUNC_SRC (53h) and WAKE_UP_SRC (1Bh) registers. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: BOOT
fields.description: Reboot memory content. Default value: 0 (0: normal mode; 1: reboot memory content)

fields.name: BDU
fields.description: Block Data Update. Default value: 0 (0: continuous update; 1: output registers not updated until MSB and LSB have been read)

fields.name: H_LACTIVE
fields.description: Interrupt activation level. Default value: 0 (0: interrupt output pads active high; 1: interrupt output pads active low)

fields.name: PP_OD
fields.description: Push-pull/open-drain selection on INT1 and INT2 pads. Default value: 0 (0: push-pull mode; 1: open-drain mode)

fields.name: SIM
fields.description: SPI Serial Interface Mode selection. Default value: 0 (0: 4-wire interface; 1: 3-wire interface).

fields.name: IF_INC
fields.description: Register address automatically incremented during a multiple byte access with a serial interface (I^2 C or SPI). Default value: 1 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: BLE
fields.description: Big/Little Endian Data selection. Default value 0 (0: data LSB @lower address; 1: data MSB @lower address)

fields.name: SW_RESET
fields.description: Software reset. Default value: 0 (0: normal mode; 1: reset device) This bit is cleared by hardware after next flash boot.

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: This bit must be set to '0' for the correct operation of the device

fields.name: ROUNDING
fields.description: Circular burst-mode (rounding) read from output registers. Default: 000 (000: no rounding; Others: refer to Table 55 )

fields.name: ST_G
fields.description: Angular rate sensor self-test enable. Default value: 00 (00: Self-test disabled; Other: refer to Table 56 )

fields.name: ST_XL
fields.description: Linear acceleration sensor self-test enable. Default value: 00 (00: Self-test disabled; Other: refer to Table 57 )

fields.name: RSVD_1
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: Xen_G
fields.description: Gyroscope pitch axis (X) output enable. Default value: 1 (0: X-axis output disabled; 1: X-axis output enabled)

fields.name: Yen_G
fields.description: Gyroscope roll axis (Y) output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Y-axis output disabled; 1: Y axis output enabled)

fields.name: Zen_G
fields.description: Gyroscope yaw axis (Z) output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Z-axis output disabled; 1: Z-axis output enabled)

fields.name: FUNC_EN
fields.description: Enable embedded functionalities (pedometer, tilt, significant motion) and accelerometer HP and LPF2 filters (refer to Figure 5 ). Default value: 0 (0: disable functionalities of embedded functions and accelerometer filters; 1: enable functionalities of embedded functions and accelerometer filters)

fields.name: PEDO_RST_STEP
fields.description: Reset pedometer step counter. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: SIGN_MOTION_EN
fields.description: Enable significant motion function. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

Interrupts.name: INT1_CTRL
Interrupts.description: INT1 pad control register (r/w). Each bit in this register enables a signal to be carried through INT1. The pad's output will supply the OR combination of the selected signals.

fields.name: INT1_STEP_DETECTOR
fields.description: Pedometer step recognition interrupt enable on INT1 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_SIGN_MOT
fields.description: Significant motion interrupt enable on INT1 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_FULL_FLAG
fields.description: FIFO full flag interrupt enable on INT1 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_FIFO_OVR
fields.description: FIFO overrun interrupt on INT1 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_FTH
fields.description: FIFO threshold interrupt on INT1 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_BOOT
fields.description: Boot status available on INT1 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_DRDY_G
fields.description: Gyroscope Data Ready on INT1 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT1_DRDY_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer Data Ready on INT1 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

Interrupts.name: INT2_CTRL
Interrupts.description: INT2 pad control register (r/w). Each bit in this register enables a signal to be carried through INT2. The pad's output will supply the OR combination of the selected signals.

fields.name: INT2_STEP_DELTA
fields.description: Pedometer step recognition interrupt on delta time^(1) enable on INT2 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_STEP_COUNT_OV
fields.description: Step counter overflow interrupt enable on INT2 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_FULL_FLAG
fields.description: FIFO full flag interrupt enable on INT2 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_FIFO_OVR
fields.description: FIFO overrun interrupt on INT2 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_FTH
fields.description: FIFO threshold interrupt on INT2 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_DRDY_TEMP
fields.description: Temperature Data Ready in INT2 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_DRDY_G
fields.description: Gyroscope Data Ready on INT2 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT2_DRDY_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer Data Ready on INT2 pad. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: Z_WU
fields.description: Wakeup event detection status on Z-axis. Default value: 0 (0: wakeup event on Z-axis not detected; 1: wakeup event on Z-axis detected)

fields.name: Y_WU
fields.description: Wakeup event detection status on Y-axis. Default value: 0 (0: wakeup event on Y-axis not detected; 1: wakeup event on Y-axis detected)

fields.name: X_WU
fields.description: Wakeup event detection status on X-axis. Default value: 0 (0: wakeup event on X-axis not detected; 1: wakeup event on X-axis detected)

fields.name: WU_IA
fields.description: Wakeup event detection status. Default value: 0 (0: wakeup event not detected; 1: wakeup event detected.)

fields.name: SLEEP_STATE_IA
fields.description: Sleep event status. Default value: 0 (0: sleep event not detected; 1: sleep event detected)

fields.name: FF_IA
fields.description: Free-fall event detection status. Default: 0 (0: free-fall event not detected; 1: free-fall event detected)

fields.name: Z_TAP
fields.description: Tap event detection status on Z-axis. Default value: 0 (0: tap event on Z-axis not detected; 1: tap event on Z-axis detected)

fields.name: Y_TAP
fields.description: Tap event detection status on Y-axis. Default value: 0 (0: tap event on Y-axis not detected; 1: tap event on Y-axis detected)

fields.name: X_TAP
fields.description: Tap event detection status on X-axis. Default value: 0 (0: tap event on X-axis not detected; 1: tap event on X-axis detected)

fields.name: TAP_SIGN
fields.description: Sign of acceleration detected by tap event. Default: 0 (0: positive sign of acceleration detected by tap event; 1: negative sign of acceleration detected by tap event)

fields.name: DOUBLE_TAP
fields.description: Double-tap event detection status. Default value: 0 (0: double-tap event not detected; 1: double-tap event detected.)

fields.name: SINGLE_TAP
fields.description: Single-tap event status. Default value: 0 (0: single tap event not detected; 1: single tap event detected)

fields.name: TAP_IA
fields.description: Tap event detection status. Default: 0 (0: tap event not detected; 1: tap event detected)

Status Sources.name: D6D_SRC

fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: D6D_IA
fields.description: Interrupt active for change position portrait, landscape, face-up, face-down. Default value: 0 (0: change position not detected; 1: change position detected)

fields.name: ZH
fields.description: Z-axis high event (over threshold). Default value: 0 (0: event not detected; 1: event (over threshold) detected)

fields.name: ZL
fields.description: Z-axis low event (under threshold). Default value: 0 (0: event not detected; 1: event (under threshold) detected)

fields.name: YH
fields.description: Y-axis high event (over threshold). Default value: 0 (0: event not detected; 1: event (over-threshold) detected)

fields.name: YL
fields.description: Y-axis low event (under threshold). Default value: 0 (0: event not detected; 1: event (under threshold) detected)

fields.name: XH
fields.description: X-axis high event (over threshold). Default value: 0 (0: event not detected; 1: event (over threshold) detected)

fields.name: XL
fields.description: X-axis low event (under threshold). Default value: 0 (0: event not detected; 1: event (under threshold) detected)

fields.name: RSVD_3_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: EV_BOOT
fields.description: Boot running flag signal. Default value: 0 (0: no boot running; 1: boot running)

fields.name: TDA
fields.description: Temperature new data available. Default: 0 (0: no set of data is available at temperature sensor output; 1: a new set of data is available at temperature sensor output)

fields.name: GDA
fields.description: Gyroscope new data available. Default value: 0 (0: no set of data available at gyroscope output; 1: a new set of data is available at gyroscope output)

fields.name: XLDA
fields.description: Accelerometer new data available. Default value: 0 (0: no set of data available at accelerometer output; 1: a new set of data is available at accelerometer output)

Timestamp.name: TIMESTAMP0_REG
Timestamp.description: Time stamp first byte data output register (r)

fields.description: Timestamp 0

Timestamp.name: TIMESTAMP2_REG
Timestamp.description: Time stamp third byte data output register (r/w). To reset the timer, the AAh value has to be stored in this register.

fields.description: Timestamp 2

Step Counter.name: STEP_TIMESTAMP_L
Step Counter.description: Step counter timestamp information register (r). When a step is detected, the value of TIMESTAMP_REG1 register is copied in STEP_TIMESTAMP_L.

fields.name: STEP_TIMESTAMP_L
fields.description: Step timestamp low

Step Counter.name: STEP_TIMESTAMP_H
Step Counter.description: Step counter timestamp information register (r). When a step is detected, the value of TIMESTAMP_REG2 register is copied in STEP_TIMESTAMP_H.

fields.name: STEP_TIMESTAMP_H
fields.description: Step timestamp high

fields.name: STEP_COUNTER_L
fields.description: Step counter low

fields.name: STEP_COUNTER_H
fields.description: Step counter high

fields.name: PEDO_4G
fields.description: This bit sets the internal full scale used in pedometer functions. Using this bit, saturation is avoided (e.g. FAST walk). 0: internal full scale = 2 g . 1: internal full scale 4 g (device full_scale @CTRL1_XL must be ≥ 4 g , otherwise internal full scale is 2 g )

fields.name: THS_MIN4
fields.description: THS_MIN[4:0] Configurable minimum threshold. 1LSB = 16 m g @PEDO_4G=0, 1LSB = 32 m g @PEDO_4G=1

fields.name: THS_MIN3
fields.description: THS_MIN[4:0] Configurable minimum threshold. 1LSB = 16 m g @PEDO_4G=0, 1LSB = 32 m g @PEDO_4G=1

fields.name: THS_MIN2
fields.description: THS_MIN[4:0] Configurable minimum threshold. 1LSB = 16 m g @PEDO_4G=0, 1LSB = 32 m g @PEDO_4G=1

fields.name: THS_MIN1
fields.description: THS_MIN[4:0] Configurable minimum threshold. 1LSB = 16 m g @PEDO_4G=0, 1LSB = 32 m g @PEDO_4G=1

fields.name: THS_MIN0
fields.description: THS_MIN[4:0] Configurable minimum threshold. 1LSB = 16 m g @PEDO_4G=0, 1LSB = 32 m g @PEDO_4G=1

fields.name: SM_THS
fields.description: Significant motion threshold. Default value: 00000110

Tap Detection.name: TAP_CFG
Tap Detection.description: Time stamp, pedometer, tilt, filtering, and tap recognition functions configuration register (r/w)

fields.name: TIMER_EN
fields.description: Time stamp count enable, output data are collected in TIMESTAMP0_REG (40h) , TIMESTAMP1_REG (41h) , TIMESTAMP2_REG (42h) register. Default: 0 (0: time stamp count disabled; 1: time stamp count enabled)

fields.name: PEDO_EN
fields.description: Pedometer algorithm enable. Default value: 0 (0: pedometer algorithm disabled; 1: pedometer algorithm enabled)

fields.name: TILT_EN
fields.description: Tilt calculation enable. Default value: 0 (0: tilt calculation disabled; 1: tilt calculation enabled.)

fields.name: SLOPE_FDS
fields.description: Enable accelerometer HP and LPF2 filters (refer to Figure 5 ). Default value: 0 (0: disable; 1: enable)

fields.name: TAP_X_EN
fields.description: Enable X direction in tap recognition. Default value: 0 (0: X direction disabled; 1:X direction enabled)

fields.name: TAP_Y_EN
fields.description: Enable Y direction in tap recognition. Default value: 0 (0: Y direction disabled; 1:Y direction enabled)

fields.name: TAP_Z_EN
fields.description: Enable Z direction in tap recognition. Default value: 0 (0: Z direction disabled; 1:Z direction enabled)

fields.name: LIR
fields.description: Latched Interrupt. Default value: 0 (0: interrupt request not latched; 1: interrupt request latched)

Tap Detection.name: TAP_THS_6D
Tap Detection.description: Portrait/landscape position and tap function threshold register (r/w)

fields.name: D4D_EN
fields.description: 4D orientation detection enable (Z-axis position detection is disabled). Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: SIXD_THS
fields.description: Threshold for D6D function. Default value: 00 For details, refer to Table 137

fields.name: TAP_THS
fields.description: Threshold for tap recognition. Default value: 00000

fields.name: DUR
fields.description: Duration of maximum time gap for double tap recognition. Default: 0000

fields.name: QUIET
fields.description: Expected quiet time after a tap detection. Default value: 00

fields.name: SHOCK
fields.description: Maximum duration of overthreshold event. Default value: 00

Tap Detection.name: WAKE_UP_THS
Tap Detection.description: Single and double-tap function threshold register (r/w)

fields.name: SINGLE_DOUBLE_TAP
fields.description: Single/double-tap event enable. Default: 0 (0: only single-tap event enabled; 1: both single and double-tap events enabled)

fields.name: INACTIVITY
fields.description: Inactivity event enable. Default value: 0 (0: sleep disabled; 1: sleep enabled)

fields.name: WK_THS
fields.description: Threshold for wakeup. Default value: 000000

Tap Detection.name: WAKE_UP_DUR
Tap Detection.description: Free-fall, wakeup, time stamp and sleep mode functions duration setting register (r/w)

fields.name: FF_DUR5
fields.description: Free fall duration event. Default: 0 For the complete configuration of the free-fall duration, refer to FF_DUR[4:0] in FREE_FALL (5Dh) configuration

fields.name: WAKE_DUR
fields.description: Wake up duration event. Default: 00 1LSB = 1 ODR_time

fields.name: TIMER_HR
fields.description: Time stamp register resolution setting. Default value: 0 (0: 1LSB = 6.4 ms; 1: 1LSB = 25 μ s)

fields.name: SLEEP_DUR
fields.description: Duration to go in sleep mode. Default value: 0000 1 LSB = 512 ODR

fields.name: INT1_INACT_STATE
fields.description: Routing on INT1 of inactivity mode. Default: 0 (0: routing on INT1 of inactivity disabled; 1: routing on INT1 of inactivity enabled)

fields.name: INT1_SINGLE_TAP
fields.description: Single-tap recognition routing on INT1. Default: 0 (0: routing of single-tap event on INT1 disabled; 1: routing of single-tap event on INT1 enabled)

fields.name: INT1_WU
fields.description: Routing of wakeup event on INT1. Default value: 0 (0: routing of wakeup event on INT1 disabled; 1: routing of wakeup event on INT1 enabled)

fields.name: INT1_FF
fields.description: Routing of free-fall event on INT1. Default value: 0 (0: routing of free-fall event on INT1 disabled; 1: routing of free-fall event on INT1 enabled)

fields.name: INT1_DOUBLE_TAP
fields.description: Routing of tap event on INT1. Default value: 0 (0: routing of double-tap event on INT1 disabled; 1: routing of double-tap event on INT1 enabled)

fields.name: INT1_6D
fields.description: Routing of 6D event on INT1. Default value: 0 (0: routing of 6D event on INT1 disabled; 1: routing of 6D event on INT1 enabled)

fields.name: INT1_TILT
fields.description: Routing of tilt event on INT1. Default value: 0 (0: routing of tilt event on INT1 disabled; 1: routing of tilt event on INT1 enabled)

fields.name: INT1_TIMER
fields.description: Routing of end counter event of timer on INT1. Default value: 0 (0: routing of end counter event of timer on INT1 disabled; 1: routing of end counter event of timer event on INT1 enabled)

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: INT2_INACT_STATE
fields.description: Routing on INT2 of inactivity mode. Default: 0 (0: routing on INT2 of inactivity disabled; 1: routing on INT2 of inactivity enabled)

fields.name: INT2_SINGLE_TAP
fields.description: Single-tap recognition routing on INT2. Default: 0 (0: routing of single-tap event on INT2 disabled; 1: routing of single-tap event on INT2 enabled)

fields.name: INT2_WU
fields.description: Routing of wakeup event on INT2. Default value: 0 (0: routing of wakeup event on INT2 disabled; 1: routing of wake-up event on INT2 enabled)

fields.name: INT2_FF
fields.description: Routing of free-fall event on INT2. Default value: 0 (0: routing of free-fall event on INT2 disabled; 1: routing of free-fall event on INT2 enabled)

fields.name: INT2_DOUBLE_TAP
fields.description: Routing of tap event on INT2. Default value: 0 (0: routing of double-tap event on INT2 disabled; 1: routing of double-tap event on INT2 enabled)

fields.name: INT2_6D
fields.description: Routing of 6D event on INT2. Default value: 0 (0: routing of 6D event on INT2 disabled; 1: routing of 6D event on INT2 enabled)

fields.name: INT2_TILT
fields.description: Routing of tilt event on INT2. Default value: 0 (0: routing of tilt event on INT2 disabled; 1: routing of tilt event on INT2 enabled)

fields.name: FF_DUR
fields.description: Free-fall duration event. Default: 0 For the complete configuration of the free fall duration, refer to FF_DUR5 in WAKE_UP_DUR (5Ch) configuration

fields.name: FF_THS
fields.description: Free fall threshold setting. Default: 000 For details refer to Table 146
